phases.title: INFERNO
phases.description: The core is exposed. Finish it now!

phases.title: THORN CROWN
phases.description: Crack the living bark before it regenerates.

phases.title: HUNGRY GARDEN
phases.description: The buried garden wakes. Burn the heart now!

phases.title: GRAVITY SURGE
phases.description: Runic gravity binds the outer flasks.

phases.title: SUPERNOVA CORE
phases.description: The forge collapses inward. Finish the core!

phases.title: FROZEN REGALIA
phases.description: Ancient regalia hardens beneath a clear frost telegraph.

phases.title: SHATTERED CHOIR
phases.description: Permafrost binds one disclosed flask after the transition.

phases.title: ABSOLUTE ZERO
phases.description: The oldest ice breaks, opening one final comeback line.

phases.title: PRESSURE CARAPACE
phases.description: A brass shell rises with a visible poison intent.

phases.title: ABYSSAL DISTILLATION
phases.description: A final transposition proceeds only when the solver accepts it.
